sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n103910" key="tiqa\s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τῐθὰς</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὄρνις, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">άδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n103910.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">barn-door fowl, hen,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.95</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alph.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
